title: Lucid Offer Quote
description: A time-limited, replay-protected pricing commitment from a compute provider for executing a specific model. All binding fields MUST match the job request.

quote_id.description: UUID nonce - prevents replay attacks. Each quote MUST have a unique quote_id.

compute_offer_passport_id.description: On-chain ComputeOfferPassport ID (Solana PDA). Links execution to on-chain registry for verifiable matching.

model_id.description: Model passport ID or HuggingFace model ID (e.g., 'hf-meta-llama/Llama-2-7b-chat')

policy_hash.description: SHA256 hash of the policy that governs this execution. Binds quote to specific policy terms.

max_input_tokens.description: Maximum input tokens this quote covers. Job MUST not exceed this.

max_output_tokens.description: Maximum output tokens this quote covers. Job MUST not exceed this.

amount.description: Price amount in the smallest unit of the currency

currency.description: Currency for the price. lamports = Solana, usd_cents = USD in cents, credits = internal credits

price.description: Price for this execution within the specified token limits

expires_at.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) - quote expires after this time. MUST be validated on job submission.

available_slots.description: Current available execution slots on this worker

estimated_wait_ms.description: Estimated wait time in milliseconds before execution starts

queue_depth.description: Current number of jobs in queue

capacity_hint.description: Optional capacity hints for client-side scheduling decisions

terms_hash.description: SHA256 hash of additional terms/pricing rules document (optional)

worker_pubkey.description: ed25519 public key of the worker that issued this quote (for signature verification)

quote_hash.description: SHA256 hash of canonical JSON of quote body (excluding quote_hash and quote_signature)

quote_signature.description: ed25519 signature of quote_hash by worker private key
